item.title: ServiceNow 和埃森哲将代理人工智能引入网络安全和风险现代化
item.summary: As digital transformation enters the AI era, ServiceNow and Accenture are helping organizations move beyond cloud migration by embedding AI agents into cybersecurity, compliance, and enterprise risk management workflows. The post ServiceNow and Accenture Bring Agentic AI to Cybersecurity and Risk Modernization appeared
